jd_text: Overview A well-established organization within the social sector is seeking a Head of Finance to lead its financial strategy, governance, and overall financial management. This role requires a seasoned finance leader with direct experience working within non-profit organizations or closely partnering with them , ensuring alignment with sector-specific regulatory, funding, and reporting requirements. The successful candidate will play a key role in driving financial sustainability, strengthening governance frameworks, and supporting executive leadership through data-driven financial insights. Key Responsibilities Lead the development and execution of the organization’s financial strategy and long-term financial planning. Oversee the annual budgeting cycle, ensuring effective allocation and utilization of financial resources. Manage financial reporting, accounting operations, and compliance with relevant regulations and standards. Provide insightful financial analysis to support strategic decision-making by senior leadership. Establish and enhance internal controls, governance frameworks, and financial policies. Monitor cash flow, financial performance, and organizational risk exposure. Prepare and present financial reports to executive leadership and governance committees. Lead, mentor, and develop the finance function to ensure high performance and continuous improvement. Requirements Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or Business Administration. Master’s degree (MBA or Finance) is preferred. Professional certifications such as CPA, CMA, or ACCA are highly desirable. Experience Minimum of 20 years of progressive experience in finance leadership roles. Proven experience within non-profit organizations or in roles involving direct engagement with the non-profit/social sector is essential. Strong background in financial planning, financial management, and governance. Demonstrated experience operating within regulated environments and managing compliance requirements. Proven ability to partner with senior leadership and contribute to strategic decision-making. Key Competencies Financial strategy and planning Financial analysis and reporting Risk management and internal controls Data-driven decision making Stakeholder communication and presentation skills Leadership and team development
